message:
✨ Add Organization & BreadcrumbList schemas + dns-prefetch for SEO (#2068)

* ✨ Add Organization, BreadcrumbList schemas and dns-prefetch hints

Enhances SEO with three additions to the Netlify edge function:
- Organization JSON-LD schema for Google knowledge panel
- BreadcrumbList JSON-LD schema for rich navigation snippets
- DNS prefetch hints for GitHub API and Google Tag Manager

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* ✨ Track analytics opt-out/opt-in with GA4 events

Fires ksc_analytics_opted_out / ksc_analytics_opted_in BEFORE setting
the localStorage flag, so the event actually reaches GA4 (send() would
drop it after the flag is set).

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
